▮ go-micro-example operator console
build · DSN-027 2026-05-20 00:00:00 UTC
surfaces 9
SEC-002a

Authenticate

until you unlock, mutating cards show a locked scope view.

  1. DSN-026

    REST create

    PUT a new product through the inventory API and read it back.

    PUT /api/v1/inventory
    inventory.create
  2. DSN-016

    Production event

    Record production for a SKU. The handler writes the production_events row, updates available, then publishes in parallel to RabbitMQ (inventory.exchange) and Kafka (product-quantity-changed.v1) when each is wired. Both producers are OTel-instrumented — their spans land under the same trace id.

    PUT /api/v1/inventory/{sku}/productionEvent
    amqp + kafka
  3. DSN-018

    Outbound REST

    Hit the catalog client; observe retries, deadlines, and OTel client span.

    GET /api/v1/inventory/{sku}
    catalog.lookup
  4. DSN-020

    Redis cache

    Read the same SKU twice; the second response is a cache hit on the response cache.

    GET /api/v1/inventory/{sku}
    cache.aside
  5. DSN-021a

    Idempotency

    Repeat a mutating PUT with the same Idempotency-Key — byte-identical response, only one effect.

    PUT /api/v1/inventory
    idem.replay
  6. DSN-021b

    Rate limit

    Hammer /auth/token until the Redis-backed bucket says 429.

    POST /auth/token
    rl:auth
  7. DSN-021c

    User cache

    Authenticate twice; second auth resolves the user row from Redis instead of Postgres.

    POST /auth/token
    cache.user
  8. DSN-024

    RabbitMQ

    Publish an inventory update; observe the AMQP envelope land on the exchange.

    PUT /api/v1/inventory/{sku}/productionEvent
    amqp.publish
  9. DSN-022

    gRPC

    Pending DSN-022. Listed here so the surface is visible from day one.

    RPC inventory.v1.Inventory/GetProduct
    grpc.invoke

Every input/output surface, exercised end-to-end.

read the spec ▸ /docs

IDLE awaiting a card --- · standby

Fire any capability on the left. The full request, response, and a live ASCII span tree appear here.
